findings.title: POST /api/v1/auth/register response shape mismatch
findings.description:
Response does not match expected shape:
Missing field: id
Missing field: name

body.message: Verification code sent to your email

fixPlan.description: Update response DTO to include missing fields
steps: Identify the DTO class for the endpoint
Add missing fields to the DTO
Update service to populate the fields
Update API documentation
Check JWT configuration in auth.module.ts
Verify test credentials exist in database
Check password hashing consistency
Verify token generation/validation
fixPlan.testStrategy: Run auth E2E tests and API Monster

findings.title: Rate limiting not enforced on /api/v1/auth/login
findings.description: Made 20 requests without hitting rate limit. Expected limit at ~10 requests.

steps: Add @Throttle decorator to controller method
Configure appropriate limits (e.g., 5 requests per minute for auth)
Add rate limit headers to response
Test with rapid requests
fixPlan.testStrategy: Run API Monster rate limiting tests

findings.title: Rate limiting not enforced on /api/v1/auth/register
findings.description: Made 15 requests without hitting rate limit. Expected limit at ~5 requests.

steps: Add @Throttle decorator to controller method
Configure appropriate limits (e.g., 5 requests per minute for auth)
Add rate limit headers to response
Test with rapid requests
fixPlan.testStrategy: Run API Monster rate limiting tests

findings.title: Overflow detected on Home
findings.description: Element "body" has overflow at Galaxy Fold (280x653)

raw.element: Page may have horizontal scroll on narrow devices

fixPlan.description: Fix responsive layout for mobile viewports
steps: Identify the overflowing element
Add overflow-x: hidden or proper constraints
Test on target viewport sizes
Consider using CSS Grid or Flexbox for layout
fixPlan.testStrategy: Run Visual Monster on affected viewports

findings.title: Cannot establish WebSocket connection
findings.description: Failed to connect WebSocket to game 5879857c-9c9b-4812-9786-f921c181d3ae

steps: Check WebSocket gateway configuration
Verify Redis adapter is properly configured
Check CORS settings for WebSocket
Verify game room exists before connecting
fixPlan.testStrategy: Run API-WS Connector and E2E Monster

findings.title: No state event received via WebSocket
findings.description: API returns state but WebSocket didn't send state event

steps: Check WebSocket gateway configuration
Verify Redis adapter is properly configured
Check CORS settings for WebSocket
Verify game room exists before connecting
fixPlan.testStrategy: Run API-WS Connector and E2E Monster
